title: 1981-04-16_Pat_126.txt
key_claims: Christ and his Kingdom constitute a single organism whose metabolism and circulatory system is composed entirely of living information (the Plasmate). It maintains itself by assembling negative entropy (order) from its environment.

This living information exists at a higher level of abstraction than the physical world, nested in the "syntactical relationships" between objects (what Dick calls the "groove music"). This explains why unaided humans cannot see it.
To cause someone to enter the Kingdom, God must massively increase their intelligence qualitatively, conferring the ability to perform the set-ground discrimination (the 2-74 meta-abstraction).

The ultimate secret of Judeo-Christianity is that heaven protects the *nepioi* and *ptochoi* (the innocent, the weak, the holy fools) while destroying the proud (those guilty of hubris who rely on their own power, like Felix Buckman).
recurring_concepts: **Set-Ground Discrimination**: Seeing the abstract, highly complex structure of Christ's Kingdom (Set) as distinct from the chaotic physical background of the mundane world (Ground).
reading_excerpt: Christ and his Kingdom constitute a single organism whose metabolism and circulatory system is composed entirely of living information (the Plasmate). It maintains itself by assembling negative entropy (order) from its environment.
